hero.badge: AI-powered lab analysis · Free to try
hero.headline: Your lab report,
hero.subtext: Upload your blood test or medical report. Get instant visual breakdowns, plain-English explanations, and the exact questions to ask your doctor.

upload.dropSub: Drag and drop, or browse to upload
upload.sampleLink: Try with a sample CBC report →
upload.hint: Your data never leaves your device during extraction — we only send text to our AI.
upload.errorType: Only PDF, JPG, and PNG files are supported.
upload.errorSize: Your file is {{size}} MB. Please use a file under 10 MB.

results.questionsHeading: Take these to your next appointment
results.questionsSub: Generated based on your specific results
results.disclaimer: ReportRx is for informational purposes only. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional.

history.heading: Your report history
history.subtext: All reports are stored locally on your device only
history.confirmClear: Are you sure? Click to confirm
history.emptySub: Upload your first lab report to start tracking your health over time

share.heading: Share your report summary
share.subtext: This shares only the summary — no raw report data is included
share.whatsappMessage: I decoded my lab report with ReportRx. Here's my health summary → {{url}} (expires in 1 hour)

loading.step2: Analysing your values against reference ranges...
loading.tip1: Low MCV combined with low haemoglobin often points to iron-deficiency anaemia
loading.tip2: TSH above 4.0 can indicate early hypothyroidism — worth discussing with your doctor
loading.tip3: Vitamin D below 20 ng/mL is considered deficient by most clinical guidelines

auth.subtext: Save your reports across all your devices.
auth.switchToSignUp: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.switchToSignIn: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.syncBanner: Sign in to access your reports across all your devices
auth.navPrompt: Sign in to save your reports
auth.checkInbox: Check your inbox to verify your email

errors.noDataFound: Could not extract any biomarker values. Try pasting the text manually.
errors.parseError: Something went wrong analysing your report. Please try again.
errors.apiError: Our AI service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
errors.expiredLink: This link has expired. Share links are valid for 1 hour for your privacy.
errors.invalidLink: This link is invalid or has been accessed too many times.
